creator: olce@FreeBSD.org
text:
Didn't know this site. Yes, the LOR seems very similar to LOR #276 (except 
that there is no call to 'softdep_flushfiles' in my backtrace). One of the 
LORs tagged #254 is also pretty close.

	Still, I'm surprised that you closed this PR, since the abovementioned LORs 
are all in the 'unknown' state, meaning (at least to me) they have not being 
investigated and are potentially harmful. If this is the current policy for 
those, I'll live with that, although I find it rather strange.

	Thanks for your time,

		Olivier Certner
